templates.feeReminder: Dear [ParentName], this is a reminder that [StudentName]'s tuition fee of Rs [Amount] for [Month] is due on [DueDate]. Please pay at the earliest. - [CoachingName]
templates.scoreReport: Dear [ParentName], [StudentName] scored [Marks]/[MaxMarks] ([Grade]) in [Subject] - [TestName] held on [Date]. Teacher's Remark: [Remark] Keep encouraging your child! - [CoachingName]
